sections.heading: What is LocalStorage, SessionStorage & Security?
sections.body: Client-side storage options, security implications, and when to use each. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
LocalStorage, SessionStorage & Security is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind LocalStorage, SessionStorage & Security is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use LocalStorage, SessionStorage & Security every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most LocalStorage, SessionStorage & Security implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding LocalStorage, SessionStorage & Security is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
